reviews.title: Hotel needs to be cleaner and updated in my honest opinion. The photos on booking should be updated as well as they did
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly.
reviews.negatives:
Dirty. The moment I stepped into the hotel it just didn’t felt right. It was very dim in there and the floor was dirty. The hotel in general looked run down. The hotel room and lobby in front of our hotel room was SUPER dirty and was nothing like what was shown on the booking website. The carpet was stained and mold was present. The exit stair door were all opened for some reason and did not look for feel safe at all. 

When we got to our rooms the doors were already opened up. We checked other hotel rooms and they were open as well. The AC in our room was blowing hot air while being on the COLD setting and left on for about 15mins before confirming it wasn’t blowing cold. 

Our family decided to take the penalty hit and cancel our stay and went to a different hotel. It was that bad.

There is a lot of dirt and dust in the corners. The pool is almost dangerous. Holes in the floor, the ladder is broken. The elevators move with an interesting algorithm. Recommendation for the hotel: I understand that the staff gets up early in the morning, but cleaning the rooms before 09:00 is not appropriate. They always disturbed us after breakfast so we sent them to come later. Then they didn't come at all. We were even woken up by a drill before 08:00 in the morning. They were probably renovating the room. The hotel should focus more on the comfort of tourists.

We needed to know information about our sleepbus departure place and time, and we couldn’t understand a thing because everything was in Vietnamese and automatic translation tools weren’t working as we wish, so hotel staff helped us with everything starting from calling customer support of the transit bus company and knowing the details of the departure place to inputting the data of departure place to Grab (taxi app).
reviews.negatives:
Old facilities. Shower wasn’t working properly, so that the water stuck on the floor, even though we asked to clean the drain, it didn’t help. 
Air conditioning system isn’t working at the main hall, so it was very hot for both clients and employees of the hotel.
Breakfast didn’t offer much of variety of food to choose from. We went once after 9am and almost everything was gone, so we went outside to have breakfast. 
Vietnam offers different options for breakfast and everything is pretty close, so we didn’t struggle to find something to eat, so we decided to skip breakfasts in the end.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff were great. They upgraded us to the bigger room right when we checked in. Great  buffet breakfast every day, rooftop top pool and gym . 5 minute walk to the beach and a ton of restaurants very close by.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is a little dated but clean. The pool  and wooden lounge chairs could use a little TLC but overall we loved it.

reviews.title: Not highly regarded.
reviews.text: I booked a room for 4 nights in Nha Trang, at a price of about 600 a night. This price is for a room for 3 people, with one large bed and one small bed. There is a dressing table and one soft armchair. Breakfast is not included. The room claims to have a sea view, but there is very little view of the sea. On Agoda it says there is a bathtub, but the room actually does not have one. The bathroom often has a strange smell, like sewage. It only gets better after the room is cleaned, but the smell returns the next day. It doesn't feel very clean. On the first day, when checking in, the trash from the previous guest hadn't been taken out. In summary, for the price, I don't think the service is very satisfactory, although the proximity to the beach is a plus, just crossing the road to get there, and the staff attitude is very good. The hotel has many foreign guests. I wouldn't come back.

Staff was nice but spoke very limited English so most communication had to be through Google translate. The bathroom had worms and flies coming up of the drain och the place was quite dusty in corners. It's definitely not a 4* hotel.
Beds were comfy and sheets were clean so can't complain on that but the tapestry was falling of the wall so it doesn't feel well maintained or as luxurious as the pictures.

reviews.title: The best for this budget
reviews.positives:
The price just fantastic for the service you have. The room is not new, but everything is very clean and working. Comfortable mattress, kettle, tea, coffee, bath tab with hot water, tv, ac, balcony, mountain view, drinking water renewed every day, small fridge. 
Staff is super fast and friendly. Breakfast was simple but tasty. Cleaning every day. On top small sweampool and tiny gym (most for heavy guys who can lift dumbbells starting +7 kg). Beach just after crossing road. Around many small cafe, fruits, ice-cream and markets. I really recommend it for budget travellers. Would come back again. Thanks to staff!
reviews.negatives: The tv switching on when enter room, need to off every time. Not big deal.

reviews.title: Good Budget Travel Hotel
reviews.text:
Stayed here with my partner and it was a satisfactory time. I would recommend this place to friends and couples alike if they were looking for a standard budget hotel at low costs. 
Reception upgraded us, hotel room was clean and we were given a fruit plate on arrival. The food at the buffet breakfast was also very diverse.  The pool upstairs was also very clean although not big - but it was not busy at all when we were there.
Some pointers: some reception staff weren't really trained in helping us book transfers, however they were willing to try.  The bathroom is very clean but it is hard to have a shower if you are on the bigger end because you will almost always completely drench the floor since the bathtub is not attached or big enough for the amount of water. 
Downside is, although they say its available, there is no room service or towels available at reception for the pool/beach, and the pool bar upstairs is not attended to at all. 
Apart from that it was great :)

reviews.title: Best choice for travelers mixing work and relax.
reviews.positives: As a business traveler with a love for beachside escapes, Sochi Hotel in Nha Trang offered a balanced experience. The location is excellent—just steps from the beach and close to cafes and convenience stores. My room was clean, with a sea view and a quiet workspace. Wi-Fi was stable enough for remote work, and the rooftop pool was a great way to unwind after meetings. Staff were friendly, though service varied. Breakfast was decent, with both local and Western options. Overall, it’s a practical choice for travelers mixing work and leisure.

reviews.text: Its only downside is being located in an alley, so picking up service cars might be inconvenient.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Quỳnh,

Warmest greetings from Sochi Hotel Nha Trang!

Thank you very much for your perfect 10/10 review and for staying with us for 4 nights.

We are delighted to know that you found your stay worth the money. Your positive feedback is truly encouraging for our entire team.

Regarding the location in the alley, we understand that it may sometimes cause slight inconvenience for pick-up services. However, many guests also appreciate the quieter and more peaceful atmosphere compared to the main street. Our team is always happy to assist guests with directions or coordinating transportation when needed.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back to Sochi Hotel Nha Trang in the near future.

Best regards,
Henry Dang
Sochi Hotel Nha Trang

reviews.title: Lage gut. Rezeption- und Reinigungspersonal sehr unfreundlich.

The octagonal pool is small but pretty, and there is a thoughtful consideration to ensure relaxation in the common spaces. I will rest well and leave.
reviews.response:
JEAHO님께,

Sochi Hotel Nha Trang를 선택해 주시고 소중한 리뷰를 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 저희 하우스키핑 팀의 깔끔한 서비스와 아늑한 객실을 만족스럽게 이용하셨다니 매우 기쁩니다. Lý 옥상 수영장과 공용 공간에서 편안하게 휴식을 취하실 수 있었다니 다행입니다.

주변 인프라가 러시아 고객 중심으로 구성된 점은 아쉬웠겠지만, 재방문 의사가 100%라고 해 주셔서 저희 팀에게 큰 힘이 됩니다.

다시 만나 뵐 날을 고대하겠습니다.

감사합니다,
Henry Dang
Sochi Hotel Nha Trang

reviews.title: Pauvre
reviews.text:
Malheureusement cet hôtel peut être qualifié d'hôtel de gamme inférieure...les photos et la description sont mensongères et trompeuses 
Hôtel vieux et sale...très nombreuses tâches sur les tapis des couloirs,chambres mal isolées,pas d rideaux (salle de bain et chambres).
La "salle de sport" est minuscule et minimaliste :matériel cassé.
Les portes des chambres se  ferment et s'ouvrent en mettant un puissant coup d'épaule.
Je me suis tromper en regardant les photos mais c'est mon premier et dernier séjour dans ce taudis.
Le mini frigo est immonde il sent mauvais et il est piqué par la rouille.
Il ya de bien meilleures options dans le secteur.Experience à oublier :ne mérite même pas 2 étoiles,je pense que de nombreux commentaires laudatifs sont faux.
reviews.response:
Dear Hassan,

We sincerely apologize for the disappointing experience you had during your stay. Your feedback is very important to us, and we take your comments regarding cleanliness, maintenance, and facilities seriously. We are reviewing these issues with our team to improve the quality of our rooms and services.

We regret that your stay did not meet your expectations and hope to have the opportunity to provide a better experience in the future.

Warm regards,
Henry Dang
Sochi Hotel Nha Trang

reviews.negatives: 房间比较小，一个人住正好，两个人的话就会比较拥挤。

reviews.title: Mauvais séjour
reviews.text:
Pour parler du positif, le personnel de la réception était très chaleureux et serviable. C’est ce qui remonte notre ressenti.
Cependant, la chambre et l’hôtel ne correspondent pas aux photos. L’hôtel est très mal entretenu : baignoire qui fuit car fendue, aucun joint, pas fixée.
Ampoules défectueuses, odeur d’humidité, pas de rideau de douche donc de l’eau de partout. Saleté dans les chambres, ménage à moitié fait.
Petit déjeuner catastrophique, l’amabilité du personnel laisse à désirer, sans parler de la qualité des plats.
Les personnes du ménage sont désagréables. Et le ménage est mal fait, les serviettes sont tachées, les tasses ne sont pas remplacées. Sans parler du fait qu’elles hurlent dans le couloir quelque soit l’heure, comme si il n’y avait pas de clients dans les chambres. Je ne parle même pas de l’insonorisation inexistante.
Passez votre chemin si rien ne change

reviews.title: OK pour petit budget.
reviews.text:
Nous avons passé une semaine au sein de cet hôtel. La chambre était petite, propre et avec un petit balcon. Par contre, une terrible odeur d'égoût se dégageait très souvent des canalisations de la salle de bain...insupportable.
La piscine est assez petite mais elle fait le travail.
Le petit-déjeuner était le plus mauvais de tous les petit-déjeuner que j'ai pris au Vietnam: très peu de variété de plat, fruits pas ouf, pas vraiment de réassort.... J'ai co'nu beaucoup mieux.
L'hôtel est située à 20 min du centre-ville, mais tout au long vous avez pleins de petits commerces de fruits et légumes, boissons, cafés, restaurants, c'est vivant.
Le personnel à l'accueil très aimable et patient.
reviews.response:

Warm greetings from Sochi Hotel Nha Trang!

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your recent 7-night stay with us.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced during your stay. We are truly sorry about the unpleasant odor from the bathroom drainage. This is certainly not the standard we aim to provide, and we will immediately have our maintenance team inspect and resolve this issue.

We also regret to hear that our breakfast did not meet your expectations in terms of variety and quality. Your comments have been noted and will be shared with our kitchen team to improve both the selection and replenishment of dishes.

Es gibt ebenfalls ein Fitnessstudio, was auch kostenlos nutzbar ist. Der Pool ist allerdings etwas heruntergekommen… Das war schade. Zu Fuß braucht man in die Innenstadt 30 Minuten. Ich habe immer ein Grape Roller genommen. Direkt gegenüber vom Hotel ist der Strand.
Alles in allem würde ich das Hotel definitiv empfehlen, weil das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis wirklich super ist

reviews.text: Ich habe mich für meinen Aufenthalt in Nha Trang für das Sochi Hotel entschieden und es sehr genossen. Das Zimmer war sehr sauber und schön. Ein großes bequemes Bett und ein großes Badezimmer. Ich hatte eine schöne Aussicht auf die Stadt. Das Hotel hat ein Pool und ein Fitnessstudio im 21 Stockwerk. Leider scheint die Sonne nur kurz am Tag auf den Poolbereich. Trotzdem ist es schön sich im Pool abzukühlen. Das Personal ist sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich. Man kann auch vor Ort seine Wäsche waschen lassen für einen angemessenen Preis von 60.000 vnd pro Kilogramm Wäsche. Ich kann dieses Hotel für seine Preisleistubg nur sehr ans Herz legen. Tolle Erfahrung!

Phòng có máy sấy tóc mà ko hoạt động, dịch vụ giặt ủi rất tệ, đưa đồ giặt để sáng mai lấy mà sáng check out phòng lúc 6h45 để đi ra bắc ăn tết mà đi sớm xíu cho đỡ đông xe ai dè hỏi lấy đồ giặt ủi thì ks chưa có mà không biết đưa đi đâu giặt, gia đình mình con nhỏ lại đông cứ chờ đợi chán chê nv lễ tân cứ gọi đt suốt mà ko xử lý đc. Mình gọi số hotline lúc đặt phòng chắc là chị chủ có xin lỗi vì nv  sơ xót ko hỏi giờ mình lấy đồ rồi này nọ xong rồi cũng ok cho qua mà bảo 8h có đồ lên lỡ rồi mình chờ để lấy mà lúc minh gọi chị số hotline bảo có đồ rồi mà họ chưa giặt kịp thì mình cũng ok thôi mang đi điểm tiếp theo nhờ ks giặt. Lúc lấy đồ nv lễ tân thu 120k của con mình nó hỏi tiền gì bảo giặt đồ rồi nên thôi cũng ko sao, nhưng lúc mình ktra thì đồ có giặt rồi thật nhưng ko ủi và để nhăn nhúm như mớ rẻ lau nên lúc đấy là sôi máu thất vọng nè…chẳng có thời gian mà bực bội quá nên phải viết nên đây cho mọi người biết để ko bị giống mình. Sẽ ko bg quay lại ks này

 (gd  mình cũng ở ks khu này nhiều lần rồi đều qua đêm và sáng đi sớm đồ họ đều giặt ủi rất tinh tươm phục vụ rất tốt, riêng chỗ này thất vọng)

We truly hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back again on your next visit to Nha Trang.

Warm regards,
Henry Dang
Sochi Hotel Nha Trang
